profile.dominance: balanced aero, traction, and tyre management
profile.car_trait: high downforce, slow-corner traction, kerb compliance
profile.strategy_bias: one-stop or two-stop depending on safety car and tyre delta
profile.setup: high downforce, slow-corner traction, kerb compliance; stable aero balance in wind

dynamic_reasons.tyre_stress: historical average around 1.4093567251461987 stops per driver
dynamic_reasons.speed_profile: car trait inferred as high downforce, slow-corner traction, kerb compliance

dynamic_track_source.source: Jolpica full cached history + Open-Meteo + optional FastF1

weather.impact: dry baseline more likely; wind may affect braking stability and aero balance

explanation.tyres: Expected sequence: medium, hard; tyre risk medium.
explanation.weather: Rain impact score 12.0; weather confidence depends on source freshness.
explanation.risk: Reliability/DNF risk is reflected by 65.3 reliability and 34.73% DNF probability.
explanation.qualifying: Qualifying/grid component pending affects track-position confidence.

prediction_model.source: Hybrid full-data cache model: Jolpica full history + official Formula 1 timing/static feeds + optional OpenF1 free historical timing + FastF1 + Open-Meteo + ICS/F1 calendar
prediction_model.logic: Stacked racecraft ensemble: RF/HGB/ExtraTrees win/podium/top10 classifiers, RF/HGB/ExtraTrees finish-position regressor, neural lap-time forecaster, transparent driver/team/circuit formula, official/OpenF1 timing sectors/speeds/stints/pits, recency-weighted form, qualifying/grid strength, track traits, weather traits, tyre strategy, sprint, reliability, upgrades, and regulation-era modifiers

warnings: Set F1DB_SQLITE_PATH or F1DB_CSV_DIR to enable local F1DB enrichment.
Set RELBENCH_F1_ENABLED=true and install relbench to run offline benchmarks.

baseline.label: Baseline
baseline.notes: Current model stack with no scenario shock applied.

rain.label: Rain
rain.notes: Weights weather adaptation, reliability, and team strategy more heavily.

safety_car.label: Safety Car
safety_car.notes: Weights pit execution, strategy flexibility, and attack potential.

high_tyre_degradation.label: High Tyre Degradation
high_tyre_degradation.notes: Weights race pace, pit execution, and reliability for tyre-stress races.

low_overtaking.label: Low Overtaking
low_overtaking.notes: Weights qualifying, track position, and defending strength.

high_wind.label: High Wind
high_wind.notes: Weights weather adaptation, reliability, and Active Aero suitability.
